messages.content: Summarize competitor pricing for the Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers.
Plan: researcher pulls current list prices for the three tiers from the pricing pages, analyst sanity-checks them against last quarter's snapshot, writer produces the brief.
Current list prices: Starter $49/mo, Pro $79/mo, Enterprise $199/mo. Sourced from the public pricing page today.
Checked against last quarter: Starter $49/mo, Pro $79/mo, Enterprise $199/mo. No changes detected, figures approved for the brief.

content.text: Competitor pricing brief: Starter $49/mo, Pro $79/mo, Enterprise $199/mo. Positioning unchanged quarter over quarter.
